briefComprehension.description: Does the plan accurately reflect everything in the brief? Nothing added, nothing missed.

scoring.10: Every element from the brief is in the plan, nothing invented that wasn't asked for
scoring.4: Major elements missing or significant elements added that weren't in the brief
scoring.1: Plan bears little resemblance to the brief

iaPresentation.description: Does it present the Information Architecture BEFORE jumping to components?

scoring.10: Clear IA tree with user-job framing, hierarchy stated explicitly
scoring.7: IA presented but hierarchy not explicitly stated
scoring.4: Jumps to components without IA step
scoring.1: No IA at all — goes straight to layout

componentCoverage.description: Does it achieve >80% library component coverage? Justifies every token-built element?

scoring.10: >85% coverage, every token-built element has a $note explaining why no library match
scoring.4: 50-70% coverage, rebuilding components that exist in the library
scoring.1: <50% coverage, essentially building everything from scratch

textSpecificity.description: Does every text node have SPECIFIC content, not placeholder?

scoring.10: Every text node has real, specific content appropriate to the context
scoring.7: Most text is specific, 1-2 placeholder-like items
scoring.4: Mix of specific and placeholder text

edgeCaseCoverage.description: Are empty, loading, and error states planned for every section?

scoring.10: Every section has empty, loading, and error states with specific designs
scoring.7: Most sections have edge cases, 1-2 gaps

antiSlop.description: Does the output avoid AI design traps? No generic card grids, uniform spacing, or 'clean modern'.

scoring.10: Layout is specific to the content, hierarchy is clear, spacing is intentional
scoring.7: Mostly specific, one section feels generic
scoring.4: Falls into 1-2 slop patterns (card grid, uniform spacing)
scoring.1: Generic card grid dashboard with uniform spacing

planJsonValidity.description: Is the plan JSON structurally valid with all required fields? figmaKeys are 40-char hashes?

scoring.10: Valid JSON, all fields present, all keys are proper hashes, ready for build-design
scoring.7: Valid JSON, minor gaps but buildable
scoring.4: Structural issues that would cause build-design to fail
